scripts.build:libs: npm run build -w libs/domain && npm run build -w libs/shared && npm run build -w libs/adapters && npm run build -w libs/failover
scripts.build: npm run build:libs && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/worker && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w libs/shared && npm run test -w libs/failover
